description_long: This is a classic outdoor bench featuring a seat and backrest made from evenly spaced, dark brown wooden slats. The frame and legs are constructed from ornate black wrought iron, with decorative scrollwork on the sides and rounded finials atop the backrest supports. The bench is designed to comfortably seat two to three people and provides both armrests and a supportive backrest. The wooden slats are smooth and slightly glossy, contrasting with the matte, textured finish of the ironwork. The structure is robust and stable, with the iron legs flaring outward for added support. This bench is well-suited for placement in parks, gardens, or along urban sidewalks.
description: A decorative outdoor bench with dark brown wooden slats and ornate black wrought iron frame, featuring armrests and a supportive backrest.
description_view_0: Side view showing the profile of the wooden slats, ornate iron scrollwork, and the armrest detail.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the full width of the seat and backrest, as well as the symmetrical iron frame.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the scrollwork and armrest details seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the wooden slats and the dual iron supports running vertically.
attribute_leg_design: ornate curved wrought iron legs with scrollwork
